Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Redmoon Hall]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Redmoon Hall is a group of servants that attend to the Bleeding Phoenix's feeding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Members of Redmoon Hall sense the Bleeding Phoenix's needs through parasites embedded in their bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The ranks of Redmoon Hall include Jade and Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Redmoon Hall may show themselves within a week if the Bleeding Phoenix is alerted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Redmoon Hall is an organization with emissaries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Redmoon Hall is a group that Lindon and Yerin are discussing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Redmoon Hall is a group or entity being opposed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Redmoon Hall is not after Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon Hall is washing over the southern Empire like a tide.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon Hall is a group that has nested near the border.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon Hall is an entity that can be destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — Redmoon Hall is a group that the Skysworn are going sword-to-sword with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Redmoon Hall is an organization Yerin does not wish to work for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Redmoon Hall is a threat to the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Redmoon Hall is a group that attracted the attention of the Jai Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Redmoon Hall is an entity Lindon is not eager to rush into battle against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin is an emissary of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Redmoon Hall has closed Arelius branches in the south.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Emissaries from Redmoon Hall have already performed an action Lindon mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Redmoon Hall is a group currently in the Empire.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin possesses the power of Redmoon Hall inside her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Redmoon Hall is a group that has members who can be captured and compelled to work for the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — The Redmoon Hall girl is present in the clearing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Redmoon Hall is a threat Eithan mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Redmoon Hall is a group whose emissaries wear black-and-red robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Redmoon Hall is an organization Eithan intends to mop up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon Hall has territory on the edge of the Ghostwater portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Redmoon Hall is a group largely made up of scavengers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The characters are approaching Redmoon Hall territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin and Mercy are seen as members of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Redmoon Hall is interested in the Trackless Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Redmoon Hall retrieved something in Ghostwater.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon Hall possesses Blood Shadows.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Redmoon Hall is a group on the red floor of the Dreadgod tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Redmoon Hall is a location or faction associated with Blacksword.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Redmoon Hall is a sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Blacksword is from Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Redmoon Hall is a faction represented by Yan Shoumei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Yan Shoumei is a member of Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Redmoon Hall possesses a red-tinged cloudship painted with a Bleeding Phoenix symbol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — A member of Redmoon Hall launched a crimson bird technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Redmoon Hall has an Overlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Redmoon Hall has a technique to break down a Blood Shadow for power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Redmoon Hall is one of the groups surrounding the valley.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Malice hates Redmoon Hall.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Redmoon Hall is a group with a mobile headquarters consisting of a massive ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Redmoon Hall has an audience hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Redmoon Hall possesses a great ship that floats beside the northern peak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Redmoon Hall is a group or organization that Emissary Kahn Mala belongs to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Emissaries of Redmoon Hall guard the stone door.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Redmoon Hall was not present at the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Redmoon Hall is led by a Herald and a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Redmoon Hall is a group that includes the leader Redmoon and Emissaries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Redmoon Hall is not a unified force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Redmoon Hall members who have bonded a Blood Shadow are called Emissaries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Redmoon Hall is a group with members present at the scene.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon Hall members avoid conflict between their two leaders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon Hall has script formations and construct networks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Redmoon Hall is divided into two halves with conflicting goals regarding the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Redmoon Hall is a group that Yerin wants to see tear itself apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Phoenix manifests a small portion of itself onto Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Redmoon Hall operates from a cloud fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Redmoon Hall's cloud fortress is leaking cloud madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Reigan Shen's weapons were preparing to destroy Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The members of Redmoon Hall are shrinking back in fear.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Redmoon Hall has a cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Kahn Mala belongs to Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Redmoon Hall is attached to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Redmoon Hall remains in the area.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei has connections in Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Redmoon Hall is described as being worse than run-of-the-mill slaughter artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Redmoon Hall is a group that Yan Shoumei belongs to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Redmoon Hall is under the protection of the Void Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yan Shoumei is from Redmoon Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Kahn Mala is from Redmoon Hall.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
